TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Klaus Werner Iohannis ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 6, Klaus Iohannis, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Romania ta' misuw hya' ga Klaus Iohannis, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: klaus~…ē werner iońßannis~…ē rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, klaus~…ē iońßannis~…ē, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw romania ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a klaus~…ē iońßannis~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Klaus Werner Iohannis ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 6, Klaus Iohannis, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Romania ta' misuw hya' ga Klaus Iohannis, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw romania ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a klaus~…ē iońßannis~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
